headline: What You Need To Know Ahead of Citizens Financial's Earnings Release
summary: Citizens Financial is expected to announce its second-quarter earnings in July, and Wall Street expects the company’s EPS to increase by double digits.

raw.headline: What You Need To Know Ahead of Citizens Financial's Earnings Release

headline: 1 Bank Stock with Exciting Potential and 2 We Find Risky
summary: Banks play a critical role in the financial system, providing everything from commercial loans to wealth management and payment processing services. These institutions have benefited from improved net interest margins and robust credit growth, so it’s no surprise the banking industry has posted a 11.1% gain over the past six months, beating the S&P 500 by 4.9 percentage points.

headline: Capital Deterioration Projected In Stress Test Falls To Lowest Level In 7 Years
summary: Projected losses dropped for the second year in a row in this year's Federal Reserve stress test compared to the year prior, to the lowest level in at least seven years. Read more here.
